title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Fields, Framing, and Request Smuggling Defense · Type-System Trace: Forwarded Overwrite Topology
summary: The origin and proxy disagree about framing, forwarded fields are appended without trust, hop-by-hop fields cross boundaries, and parser tolerance is enabled to fix malformed clients. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts forwarded overwrite topology increment in proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Require trusted proxies to overwrite client-controlled Forwarded and X-Forwarded values and validate the observed hop count against every reachable topology.
Strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control Host and authority, handle Connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Forwarded Overwrite Topology · Theory Forwarded Overwrite Topology
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 8790 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reject untrusted topology, ambiguous framing, and insecure parser policy; retain compatibility with one older generated client; then change the method and preserve both status and durable-effect evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
